codes.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Codes
codes.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront releases limited-time codes tied to updates, milestones, and community announcements. The active codes below redeem for Points, while older event codes are listed as expired so you do not waste time on dead entries.
redeemSteps: Launch ST Blockade Battlefront from the Roblox experience page.
Enter a live game server instead of staying on the Roblox listing.
Open the in-game code redemption area or use the !redeem command format shown on each code card.
Paste the code exactly, including the !redeem prefix and spacing.
Claim the reward during the active update cycle.
rewardTypes: Points for progression and unit purchases
Cens from older milestone codes and in-game wave rewards
Skins, mastery cards, and boosters from event-style rewards

beginnerGuide.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront is a Roblox wave tower defense and survival shooter where you defend a base against escalating enemy waves. New players should focus on the wave rhythm, skill keys, unit purchases, and Titan timing before chasing late-game builds.

steps.title: Join the Roblox Experience
steps.description: Open the ST Blockade Battlefront Roblox page by Loading Studi and enter a live server to start a defense run.

steps.title: Understand the Objective
steps.description: Defend the base while enemies arrive in waves. The game blends tower defense with survival shooter action, so fighting, unit placement, and staying alive all matter.

steps.title: Deploy Units and Use Titans
steps.description: Use regular units for early pressure and save stronger Titan options for harder waves, bosses, and crowded fights.

steps.title: Practice Ability Keys
steps.description: Moves use Q, E, R, T, Y, F, G, H, Z, X, C, V, B, and double spacebar. Some moves also depend on key stacks, aerial variants, or special conditions.

steps.title: Spend Between Waves
steps.description: Use earned currency and shop opportunities to improve your weapons, units, and Titan access as the waves scale up.

steps.title: Track Official Update Channels
steps.description: Follow the official Discord, Trello, and developer videos for code changes, update notes, and server issues. Use /e vote when a server needs a restart.

quickTips: Learn each character's skill timing before pushing harder modes.
Save Titan deployments for waves where their health and AoE actually change the fight.
Spend currency on practical combat upgrades instead of nonessential purchases.
Report bugs in the official Discord so the developers can patch them faster.

characterTierList.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Character Tier List
characterTierList.intro: Character strength in ST Blockade Battlefront depends on the wave, enemy type, and whether you need burst damage, support, mobility, or tanking. This S to D grid keeps the ranking clear while adding role context for bosses, farming, and late-wave survival.

characters.name: Villain Arc Brown Cameraman
characters.bestUse: Use for high-pressure fights where Orbital Strike, flying, and buffs can swing a wave.

characters.name: Glitch Double-Plunger Cameraman
characters.bestUse: Pick when you need a normal-size character with multiple damage tools and strong carry potential.

characters.name: Amplifier Woman
characters.bestUse: Strong non-upgrade option with Soundwave pressure plus Leap and Dash movement.

characters.name: Engineer Camcorder Man
characters.bestUse: Best used for support value through revive, summons, and weapon synergy.

characters.name: Secret Agent
characters.bestUse: Chair Mode abilities make it useful against stronger enemies and in clutch moments.

characters.name: Upgraded Camcorder Strider
characters.bestUse: A sturdy ranged defender that absorbs pressure and fights from safer positions.

characters.name: Upgraded Plunger Cameraman
characters.bestUse: Solid ability spread with combo tools after its dedicated character mission.

characters.name: Elite Amplifier
characters.bestUse: Good for defensive builds using Sound Blast, Perfect Block, and Sound Wave.

characters.name: Scientist CCTV Man
characters.bestUse: Support option that can unlock a mech at Mastery 25.

characters.name: Tri Fighter Artemis
characters.bestUse: Pure ranged option with Focus Blast and High Pitch Noise.

characters.name: Camcorder Woman
characters.bestUse: Useful early for Dash and simple ranged play.

characters.name: CCTV Helicopter
characters.bestUse: Can fly and fire rockets, but lacks melee pressure.

characters.name: Screen Man
characters.bestUse: Useful early because of teleportation, Purple Screen, and Hypnosis control.

characters.name: Borer Man
characters.bestUse: Use only while learning or before stronger unlocks replace it.

characters.name: Camcorder Man
characters.bestUse: A starting character that teaches basics before players move into stronger kits.

characters.name: Amplifier Man
characters.bestUse: Good for learning sound-based AoE, but weak under heavier waves.

unitsAndTitans.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Units and Titans
unitsAndTitans.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront is built around regular units, larger characters, striders, and Titans. The easiest way to understand the roster is by faction: Cameramen for balanced damage and tanking, Speakermen for sound-based pressure, TV Men for control, and Titans for high-impact wave and boss fights.

factions.role: Balanced damage, tanking, and progression-friendly utility.
Sound-based pressure, buffs, AoE, and crowd control.
Screen effects, teleport tools, stun pressure, and defensive control.
Large-scale power units for hard waves, bosses, and high-pressure defense.
Late-game Titan upgrades built for the hardest modes and strongest enemy waves.

zombieMode.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Zombie Mode Guide
zombieMode.subtitle: Learn how Zombie V2 works, what to focus on during zombie waves, and which rewards matter most for long-term progression.
zombieMode.intro: Zombie Mode is built around surviving infected enemy waves while protecting the base, using deployed units, Titans, and active move keybinds. The mode connects directly to Zombie V2 update searches, Act 2 gameplay, X-18 progression, and late-wave survival routes.

cards.name: Mode Entry
cards.description: Open ST: Blockade Battlefront from Roblox, enter the experience, then use the mode or mission interface to start the Zombie V2 content. Players can use solo play or group play depending on the lobby setup.
cards.playerTip: Start with a stable team setup before pushing deeper waves, because Zombie Mode punishes weak early defense and poor crowd control.

cards.name: Core Objective
cards.description: Defend the base through zombie waves while clearing infected enemies and boss-style threats. The main loop is the same foundation as ST Blockade Battlefront: deploy units, use Titans, and survive escalating enemy pressure.
cards.playerTip: Do not save every active move for bosses; late zombie waves can overwhelm the base before the boss phase becomes the real problem.

cards.name: Recommended Unit Roles
cards.description: Bring strong area damage, durable frontline control, boss damage, and at least one reliable Titan option. Zombie waves reward teams that can clear many enemies quickly instead of only stacking single-target damage.
cards.playerTip: A balanced team is safer than a full boss-killer team, because Zombie Mode mixes dense waves with heavier enemy checkpoints.

cards.name: X-18 Progression
cards.description: Zombie Mode is tied to G-Toilet X-18 progression through zombie-related core drops and Act 2 gameplay routes. Players farming this mode usually focus on repeated clears, core materials, and stable late-wave runs.
cards.playerTip: Farm with consistency first. Fast failed runs are worse than slower clears when the target is rare progression material.

cards.name: Common Fail Point
cards.description: Most failed runs happen when early waves are ignored, enemy groups reach the base, or players overuse movement and damage skills without saving enough pressure for major threats.
cards.playerTip: Use the game's active move keys with intent: Q, E, R, T, Y, F, G, H, Z, X, C, V, B, and double spacebar are listed by the Roblox page as move-related keybinds.

gameModes.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Game Modes and Waves
gameModes.subtitle: Compare the main wave-defense loop, harder missions, Boss Rush, Zombie Mode, and Astro-focused content before choosing where to grind.
gameModes.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront is a wave tower defense and survival shooter where players deploy units and Titans to defend the base from escalating enemies. Each mode changes the pressure pattern: some are better for learning waves, some for boss practice, and some for resource farming.

modes.name: Standard Defense Waves
modes.focus: Base defense, unit placement, wave clearing, and learning enemy pressure.
modes.bestFor: New players learning the basic tower defense and survival shooter loop.
modes.waveNote: Enemies scale across waves, so early economy and stable unit placement matter more than rushing flashy damage.

modes.name: Hard and Higher Difficulty
modes.focus: Stronger enemy waves, tighter defense windows, and better testing for upgraded teams.
modes.bestFor: Players who already understand placement, Titan timing, and active move usage.
modes.waveNote: Higher difficulty is where weak early-wave planning becomes expensive, because the base has less room for mistakes.

modes.name: Boss Rush
modes.focus: Sequential boss fights with less emphasis on ordinary wave pacing.
modes.bestFor: Practicing boss damage, Titan control, and solo farming routes.
modes.waveNote: Boss Rush is useful when the player wants repeated boss pressure instead of a full normal-wave run.

modes.name: Zombie Mode
modes.focus: Zombie waves, infected enemies, Act 2 content, and X-18-related progression.
modes.bestFor: Players farming Zombie V2 content or practicing dense enemy survival.
modes.waveNote: Zombie Mode rewards crowd control and sustained damage because enemy groups can stack quickly.

modes.name: Astro Invasion
modes.focus: Astro enemy encounters, Astro-themed progression, and specialized unit testing.
modes.bestFor: Players building teams for Astro enemies and update-specific challenges.
modes.waveNote: Use this mode to test whether your roster can handle faster or heavier special enemies.

censMastery.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Cens, Points, and Mastery Guide
censMastery.subtitle: Understand what the main progression resources do and how to spend them without wasting early-game progress.
censMastery.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront progression revolves around currency rewards, code rewards, mission farming, and unit Mastery. New players should focus on steady wave clears, useful unit upgrades, and Mastery progress before chasing every rare item at once.

resources.usedFor: Main progression spending, shop-style purchases, and upgrade-related goals.
resources.howToGet: Earn through gameplay clears, mission farming, update rewards, and developer codes when available.
resources.playerTip: Save Cens for meaningful unit or progression gains instead of spending everything immediately on low-impact items.

resources.usedFor: Older code and guide wording often uses Points for free reward claims and early reward explanations.
resources.howToGet: Redeem valid codes through the in-game redemption system when the developer releases them.
resources.playerTip: When a reward page says Points, check the in-game reward text and current code box wording before assuming it is a separate modern currency.

resources.usedFor: Improving units and unlocking stronger move performance or late-game unit value.
resources.howToGet: Progress by using units in gameplay and by applying Mastery-related rewards when available.
resources.playerTip: Apply Mastery progress to units you actually use. Randomly feeding Mastery into unused units slows down your main team.

resources.usedFor: Granting Mastery progress or instant Mastery levels to the equipped target unit.
resources.howToGet: Appear through codes, shop-style rotation, and progression reward routes.
resources.playerTip: Equip the correct unit before using a Mastery Card. The value is tied to the unit receiving the Mastery reward.

resources.usedFor: Speeding up Mastery grinding during active farming sessions.
resources.howToGet: Available through selected rewards, codes, and rotation-based reward sources.
resources.playerTip: Use boosts only when you are ready to grind. Activating a timed boost and leaving the game wastes the best part of it.

resources.usedFor: Zombie Mode and G-Toilet X-18-related progression.
resources.howToGet: Farm Zombie Mode and Zombie V2 content repeatedly.
resources.playerTip: Do not start serious core farming until your team can survive Zombie waves consistently.

officialLinks.title: ST Blockade Battlefront Trello, Discord, and Update Links
officialLinks.subtitle: Use the official links to play the game, check updates, follow the developer, report bugs, and avoid fake code pages.
officialLinks.intro: ST Blockade Battlefront updates, codes, bug reports, and mode information are best checked through the Roblox experience page, the Loading Studi community, the official Discord, the official Trello board, and the Loading Studi YouTube channel.

links.name: Roblox Experience
links.useFor: Play ST Blockade Battlefront, check the current update title, read the game description, and launch servers.
links.note: The Roblox page lists the game as a wave tower defense and survival shooter where players deploy units and Titans to defend the base.

links.name: Loading Studi Roblox Community
links.useFor: Find the developer community connected to the Roblox experience.
links.note: Use this link instead of random Roblox groups using similar names.

links.name: Official Discord
links.useFor: Check announcements, code drops, update notes, lobbies, bug reports, and community discussion.
links.note: The Roblox page asks players to report bugs in Discord, making this the most important community link.

links.name: Official Trello
links.useFor: Browse organized game information such as units, modes, update references, and progression notes.
links.note: Use the Trello board for structured reference instead of scattered reposts.

links.name: Blockade Sirin YouTube
links.useFor: Watch official Loading Studi videos, showcases, music, leaks, and development-related uploads.
links.note: This channel is tied to Loading Studi official uploads and is safer than reuploaded clips.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ST Blockade Battlefront

questions.question: What is ST Blockade Battlefront?
questions.answer: ST Blockade Battlefront is a Roblox wave tower defense and survival shooter where you deploy units and Titans to defend a base against escalating enemy waves.

questions.question: Where can I play ST Blockade Battlefront?
questions.answer: You can play ST Blockade Battlefront for free on Roblox through the official experience page by Loading Studi.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in ST Blockade Battlefront?
questions.answer: Join a live server, open the in-game code redemption area or use the !redeem command format, paste the code exactly with the !redeem prefix, and claim the reward during the active update cycle.

questions.question: What are Titans in ST Blockade Battlefront?
questions.answer: Titans are large-scale power units in ST Blockade Battlefront used for hard waves, bosses, and high-pressure defense. Normal Titans cover the core roster, while Special Titans are late-game upgrades.

questions.question: What is the best mode to farm in ST Blockade Battlefront?
questions.answer: Normal Waves are best for early farming and learning, while Hard Mode and Zombie Mode give better Cens and Mastery returns once your units can handle the pressure.

questions.question: Is ST Blockade Battlefront free?
questions.answer: Yes. ST Blockade Battlefront is a free Roblox experience, with optional in-game purchases for units, skins, and progression boosters.
